name: Inventory count sheet
description: High-risk count sheet that focuses on the lines most likely to cause service disruption, margin leakage, or false 86 decisions.
source_ref: core-v2: tighter control loops begin with a narrow, trusted counting surface
usage_moment: Use on the defined cadence for high-risk lines before count truth feeds service and control decisions.
expected_output: A variance-reviewed count record with follow-up actions and any resulting 86 or replenishment decisions.
